tish.notes:
|

Monday Cleanings - PREMIUM -

•  Sanitize all kitchen surfaces and appliances

•  Sanitize all bathrooms,  change bath rugs if necessary according to last date changed - master spot check for mold if so use bestbet cream cleanser

•  Sweep and mop all floors

•  Vacuum carpeted areas/rugs

•  Empty garbage cans and replace liners

•  NO bed linen change just make all beds - pull tight duvet and bed sheets.

•  Washing one sink load of dishes

•  Rotate cleaning of vertical surfaces such as baseboards, windows, and doors

•  High dusting for ceiling fans, light fixtures, air vents, and cobwebs

•  spot check guest room/bathroom in renovated part of the garage.


Friday Cleanings:

•  Sanitize all kitchen surfaces and appliances

•  Sanitize all bathrooms - change bath rugs if necessary according to last date changed

•  Sweep and mop all floors

•  vacuum carpeted areas/rugs

•  Make all beds

•  Empty garbage cans and replace liners

•  Light horizontal surface dusting

•  Changing of bed linens

•  Master and Mia’s room linens are in the hallways closet next to the laundry basket. Master bedding is first two shelves of bedding, shelf below is Mias

•  Itay - room next to master, bedding is in closet inside the room, top left corner, comforter change located beneath the bed in storage box/bag

•  Jonathan - downstairs room, bedding inside wardrobe on the very left side
